notes: v0.20.7 — CLEANUP PASS 1. Stripped ~620 lines of dead code that lingered after the skill-tree (POE-style radial) and TEST (DOODLE/POPART style switcher) features were scrapped. The radial canvas script, allocate/respec logic, save/load keys, and SkillTreeData detour are all gone. apply_skill_mods at spawn now uses an empty mods dict; module + class stats stack identically. No gameplay change. RIFTS code purge deferred to v0.20.8 — has tendrils into mini-boss + caravan-defense modes that need careful refactoring.
